message:
fix: consult config.yaml for dolt.port in DefaultConfig (GH#2073)

The Dolt connector DefaultConfig() checked env vars and metadata.json
for port configuration but skipped the config.yaml / global config layer
(~/.config/bd/config.yaml). This made the documented 4-layer priority
chain incomplete -- setting dolt.port in global config had no effect.

Add config.GetYamlConfig("dolt.port") check between the metadata.json
and Gas Town/derived-port fallbacks, matching the priority order shown
by bd dolt show. Add test for config.yaml port resolution path. Fix
checkDoltLocks return arity for rows.Err() check (merge conflict with
3-arg signature on main). Update TestCheckTestPollution to expect
StatusWarning on query failure.

Fixes #2073

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
